title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run software with access to databases, storage, terminal, SSH, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges code generation and real software deployment by providing agents a complete workspace beyond code generation.
